Contents

  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_BY_RULES
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.USER_NOT_AVAILABLE instead.
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_COULD_NOT_REQUEST_FROM_USER
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.USER_NOT_AVAILABLE instead.
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_INTERACTIVELY_BY_USER
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.REJECTED instead.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.CopilotClientOptions.getGithubToken()
    Use CopilotClientOptions.getGitHubToken() instead.
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.CopilotClientOptions.isAutoRestart()
    This option has no effect and will be removed in a future release.
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.CopilotClientOptions.setAutoRestart(boolean)
    This option has no effect and will be removed in a future release.
    com.github.copilot.sdk.json.CopilotClientOptions.setGithubToken(String)
    Use CopilotClientOptions.setGitHubToken(String) instead.
